scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../kitchen && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:kitchen" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:all-systems: concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run dev --prefix \"C:/Users/PRINCE/Documents/ocean kitchen\""
scripts.build:production: npm run install:all && npm run build
